zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Lucy於大約1407年出生在英國素福爾可霍普頓時，她的父親Sir Walter Lucy22歲，母親Eleanor Archdeacon25歲。她於1425年與Thomas Hopton在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年6月22日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Lucy于大约1407年出生在英国素福爾可霍普頓时，她的父亲Sir Walter Lucy22岁，母亲Eleanor Archdeacon25岁。她于1425年与Thomas Hopton在英国英格兰史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年6月22日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Lucy was born about 1407, in Hopton, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Walter Lucy, was 22 and her mother, Eleanor Archdeacon, was 25. She married Thomas Hopton in 1425, in Hopton Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 22 June 1460, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Lucy est née environ 1407, à Hopton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Lucy, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Archdeacon, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Hopton en 1425, à Hopton Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1460, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Lucy è nata il circa 1407 nel Hopton, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Walter Lucy, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Archdeacon, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Hopton nel 1425, nel Hopton Castle, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 giugno 1460, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Lucyが約1407年にイギリススフォルクホープトンで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Lucyは22歳，母Eleanor Archdeaconは25歳であった。1425年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアホープトン カストルでThomas Hoptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年6月22日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Lucy(이)가 대략 1407년 영국 수폴크 홉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Lucy(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Archdeacon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 홉턴 카스틀에서 Thomas Hopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 6월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Lucy родилась около 1407 г. в местности хоптон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Lucy было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Archdeacon, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hopton в 1425 г. в местности хоптон кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 22 июня 1460 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
